title: Undue Significance A Starving Man Attaches
content:
Undue significance a starving man attaches
    To food
    Far off; he sighs, and therefore hopeless,
    And therefore good.

    Partaken, it relieves indeed, but proves us
    That spices fly
    In the receipt. It was the distance
    Was savory.
meaning:
"Undue Significance A Starving Man Attaches" is a quintessential example of Emily Elizabeth Dickinson's signature style...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
